title: Senior Plant Manager at ABB India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at ABB India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? ABB India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
